chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Permissible and Impermissible to Wear in the State of Ihram

text: 2630 - وَ رَوَى يَحْيَى بْنُ أَبِي اَلْعَلاَءِ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ : أَنَّهُ كَرِهَ لِلْمُحْرِمَةِ اَلْبُرْقُعَ وَ اَلْقُفَّازَيْنِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2630 - Yahya ibn Abi al-Ala narrated from Abu Abdullah, from his father (as):
"He disliked the use of a niqab (face veil) and gloves for a woman in Ihram."
